# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '11'

    - name: Build application
      run: ./gradlew build

    - name: Archive build artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: |
          build/libs/*.jar
          config/*
          scripts/*

  distribute:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
    - name: Download build artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: build-artifacts

    - name: Upload to internal distribution
      env:
        DISTRIBUTION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DISTRIBUTION_TOKEN }}
      run: |
        curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $DISTRIBUTION_TOKEN" \
        -F "file=@build/libs/app.jar" \
        -F "file=@config/config.yml" \
        -F "file=@scripts/deploy.sh" \
        https://internal-distribution.example.com/upload

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  actions: read
  checks: write
  deployments: write
  issues: write
  packages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository-projects: write
  security-events: write
  statuses: write
